# genesyscloud_auth_division_home (Data Source)

<!-- This document is automatically generated. Do not edit manually. Make changes to the schema, examples, or apis.md files in examples/data-sources/ and run 'make docs' to regenerate. -->

Data source for Genesys Cloud Divisions. Get the Home division

## API Usage

The following Genesys Cloud APIs are used by this data source. Ensure your OAuth Client has been granted the necessary scopes and permissions to perform these operations:

* [GET /api/v2/authorization/divisions/home](https://developer.genesys.cloud/devapps/api-explorer#get--api-v2-authorization-divisions-home)

## Permissions and Scopes

The following OAuth scopes are required to use this resource:

* `authorization`
* `authorization:readonly`


## Example Usage

```terraform
data "genesyscloud_auth_division_home" "home" {}

output "home_name" {
  value = data.genesyscloud_auth_division_home.home.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `description` (String) Home division description.
- `name` (String) Home division name.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
